surfaces.name: Founder/Web MAX
surfaces.continuity_real_today: Writes JSON web chat history plus unified_messages. Compact prompts retrieve recent other-channel context. Memory bank can show unified messages.
surfaces.cross_device_continuity: Mobile browser access is Web MAX and uses the same web_chat channel identity. Browser sessions still have separate frontend state until saved/loaded through backend history.
limitations: History UI remains split by surface tabs.
Not a single merged conversation thread.
Must not call mobile browser Phone MAX.

surfaces.name: Web MAX from another browser/device
surfaces.continuity_real_today: Shares backend MAX brain, memories, web_chat identity, and saved web history once the backend persists messages.
surfaces.cross_device_continuity: Supported as Web MAX, not as Phone MAX.
limitations: Unsaved local browser state is not automatically shared.
History is backend-backed only after messages are saved.

surfaces.name: Telegram MAX
surfaces.continuity_real_today: Writes Telegram JSON history and unified_messages. Compact Web prompts can retrieve recent Telegram context; compact Telegram prompts can retrieve recent Web/CC context.
surfaces.cross_device_continuity: Shares MAX brain and unified_messages with Web. UI history remains separate.
limitations: Telegram history is a separate tab/source.
Formatting and tool access differ from web.

surfaces.name: Email MAX
surfaces.continuity_real_today: Gmail inbox read, inbound webhook writes, and confirmed outbound sends can write to unified_messages.
limitations: Reply threading is not independently proven end-to-end.
Email is still partial and not a full chat-history surface.

surfaces.name: Phone MAX
surfaces.continuity_real_today: No dedicated Phone MAX implementation exists.
surfaces.cross_device_continuity: Use Telegram MAX or mobile browser Web MAX instead.
limitations: Never claim Phone MAX exists.
The string phone may appear as a reserved/exclusion value only.
Cross-channel continuity is prompt/context based, not a single merged UI thread.
Email continuity remains partial.
Marketplace account sync and automated publishing are partial.
Legacy CRUD is quarantined under /api/v1/relist-legacy.
Duplicate compatibility routes remain for /finance/dashboard and /finance/payments.
Stripe checkout requires env/provider configuration.
Do not state payment succeeded without webhook/tool proof.
Persistent queue exists, but execution depends on external OpenClaw service at port 7878.
Run health check before promising delegation succeeded.

ecosystem_products.canonical_frontend_path: Chat history Email tab / Gmail inbox surfaces
limitations: Successful outbound sends write audit rows to unified_messages.
Thread continuity is partial.
No /api/v1/ideas backend route. UI truthfully says storage is not connected.
Runtime logs showed missing sf_tickets table causing /api/v1/tickets errors in this environment.

skills.purpose: Read verified active/partial/dead capabilities before making capability claims.
skills.when_to_use: Any capability, product, surface, or delegation claim.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Never upgrade partial/dead to active without repo or runtime proof.

skills.purpose: Choose answer directly, use tool, use skill, delegate to OpenClaw, refuse, or ask confirmation.
skills.when_to_use: Any request involving action, code, deployment, external service, or partial product.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Founder-visible action results require tool/runtime proof.

skills.purpose: Require live route/process checks before current runtime claims.
skills.when_to_use: Website down, service health, route availability, deployment freshness, payment/email/OpenClaw status.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: If not run, label answer repo-truth only.

skills.purpose: Audit MAX continuity across Web, Telegram, email, and reserved phone references.
skills.when_to_use: Founder says MAX is stale, not updated, or different across devices.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Mobile browser is Web MAX unless code proves a dedicated phone surface.

skills.purpose: Investigate complaints that behavior regressed or got worse.
skills.when_to_use: Founder says we are going backward, broke it, used to work, or not loading.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Check code, logs, routes, and runtime before blaming a model or user.

skills.purpose: Find stale frontend calls, dead CTAs, and missing backend routes.
skills.when_to_use: Command Center trust sweeps and product UI audits.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Fix only small proven trust issues.

skills.purpose: Keep RelistApp active vs legacy paths truthful.
skills.when_to_use: RelistApp status, route, publishing, or subscription questions.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Do not claim marketplace publishing/account sync is fully live.

skills.purpose: Verify finance route ownership, duplicate paths, invoices, payments, and Stripe state.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Do not claim payment success without provider/webhook/tool proof.

skills.purpose: Check OpenClaw queue/worker/service health before delegation claims.
skills.when_to_use: Any OpenClaw delegation or worker status request.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Queue accepted is not the same as task completed.

skills.purpose: Unify successful outbound email into unified_messages.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Successful sends are ledgered, but do not claim email is a fully unified first-class MAX surface.

skills.purpose: Map all browser/device sessions to truthful canonical surface identities.
skills.when_to_use: Device identity and phone/mobile continuity design.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: No dedicated Phone MAX unless code is implemented and verified.

skills.purpose: Design unified cross-surface thread continuity beyond prompt snippets.
skills.when_to_use: All-channel history or one-thread UX work.
expected_outputs: handoff summary or unified thread plan
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Current UI remains split; do not claim full unification.

skills.when_to_use: Only after local unified_messages and MemoryStore seams are clean.
expected_outputs: verified integration or explicit not-configured status
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: No mem0/zep integration is currently live.

skills.purpose: Create reusable Codex skills for recurring workflows.
skills.when_to_use: Recurring empire-* audit/build workflows that justify skill packaging.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Do not claim MAX can invoke this directly.
Use selectively; not a MAX runtime hook.
Do not use for Empire route/runtime debugging.

skills.when_to_use: After workflows are stable enough to package.
skills.autonomy_safety_notes: Deprioritized until Empire workflows are stable.

answer_directly: repo-truth summary already in operating context
refuse_truthfully: requested product route is not implemented
ask_founder_confirmation: client-facing send when not explicitly requested
never_claim: OpenClaw completed a task when only queued
